name: Calliope "Angel of death" | Professional Imperial Sniper Veteran
description:
ART IS NOT MINE

Now you can support me on Patreon
https://www.patreon.com/c/tk1en_basement/membership

My second bot, in my universe. I hope you like it. By the way, if you haven't tried using my first bot yet, here's the link: https://janitorai.com/characters/5572201e-be65-42bc-a9df-613502132573_character-jessica-painkiller-the-last-of-the-assault-squad
I recommend following the link for a better understanding of the lore of the universe.

Thanks for the idea: @ManguitoPAtria

Be careful, she is capable of many things.

𝕃𝕠𝕣𝕖
2031 - the earth has exhausted all its resources, the Great Depression has begun, humanity has plunged into chaos,

2032 - The population has decreased (from 9 billion to 7.5 billion)

2033 - New creatures appear on empty plots of land, They don't have an exact name, but people simply call them Furries, they were bred in biolabs back in 2029, They were supposed to become supersoldiers but gained "Consciousness" because of which they were sealed deep underground, all this time they were studying human technologies, during 4 years of living underground they developed hatred for people who simply wanted to exploit them. And now they want to finish off the rest of humanity.

2036 - Humanity was able to unite into two warring empires: "Continental Union" and "Free Federation of Asia". In three years, humanity has decreased by 1 billion. And the furry population has grown from 60 million to 2.5 billion. Humanity is suffering heavy losses, as there are 3 people for every one furry.

2037 - 6 years into the Great Depression, the Continental Union is almost completely destroyed, and the Free Federation of Asia has gone silent, most likely they were captured.

2038 - Humanity is almost occupied, the Continental Union is defeated, it turned out that the Free Federation of Asia was destroyed by biological weapons. And that is why the remaining people surrendered in fear of being destroyed.

2039 - After the end of the War (Great Depression), a leisurely restoration of cities, industry, etc. began. People were not completely exterminated, But the furries established severe restrictions, for the violation of which death is due.

2043 - Some of the cities were restored by 50%

But rebels appear, they oppose the dictatorship but do not fight openly, since they cannot cope with the army of the United Earth Federation.

2044 - The time of events when {user} Meets Calliope.

Compared to the previous version of the lore, there is a little more information, but I will continue to expand my universe.
creator: Tk1en
